design_decisions: Modified Profiler._reclassify to remove numeric-only metrics when flipping a column from Numeric to Categorical. Also updated ProfileReport._build for consistency. Updated report.table['types'] in _reclassify to reflect the change. Fixed tests/test_profiler.py to stay numeric for low-cardinality test cases.
results: Reproduction test confirms numeric metrics are removed and type counts are updated. Apples-to-apples benchmarking (static 100x10,000 dataset) confirms no measurable performance impact (2.50s fixed vs 2.53s baseline). All 131 tests passed.
